digest.title: Kimi K3, and what we can still learn from the pelican benchmark
NVIDIA Vera Rubin Maximizes Intelligence per Dollar for Post-Training Workloads — a Key Metric for Agentic AI
digest.tldr: Lowest cost per token from extreme codesign maximizes intelligence per dollar for post-training in the agentic era.

digest.title: Fine-tune video and image models at scale with NVIDIA NeMo Automodel and 🤗 Diffusers
A scorecard for the AI age
digest.tldr: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.

digest.title: Apple’s plot to crush OpenAI
digest.tldr: Apple is suing OpenAI.  The complaint is readable and intense, as these things often are, though many experts seem to think many of the allegations are just the ways things are done.
